page_content:
PERS212 Intermediate Reading in Persian (3 Credits)

Focus on linguistic skill specific to reading; introduction to written traditions of Persian.

Prerequisite: PERS211 and PERS201; or permission of instructor. Corequisite: PERS202; or permission of instructor.

PERS251 Modern Iran (3 Credits)

General sociopolitical introduction to modern Iran from establishment of the Qajar dynasty in the late 18th century to the present day. Taught in English.

Cross-listed with: HIST219X.

Credit Only Granted for. PERS251 or HIST219X.
